text.title: Python Ecosystem Practices Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the config artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints + forbidden patterns.

section.title: Schema

example.code: { "uses_pyproject": true, "src_layout": true, "ruff_configured": true, "mypy_strict": true, "lockfile_present": true, "pre_commit_present": true, "no_print_rule": true, "py_typed_marker": true, "python_min": "3.11" }

example.note: setup.py-only project; top-level package layout; mypy non-strict; missing ruff + lockfile + pre-commit.

pattern.description: setup.py as the only metadata source (no pyproject.toml)
pattern.why: Violates pyproject-single-source; tooling cannot honour PEP 621.

pattern.description: Production deploy installing from requirements.txt with unpinned versions
